entities.name: Aripiprazole
entities.context: Emotional and dopaminergic stabilizer taken pre-sleep at 2mg dose

entities.name: Magnesium Glycinate
entities.context: COMT cofactor for clearing dopamine and enabling sleep, 200-400mg dose

entities.name: Psyllium Husk
entities.context: Optional second dose for overnight satiety and morning regularity, 5-10g with 12oz+ water

entities.name: Dopamine Clearance
entities.context: Pre-sleep focus area — clearing dopamine to enable proper sleep architecture

entities.name: Sleep Architecture
entities.context: The structural quality of sleep, supported by dopamine clearance and magnesium

entities.name: COMT
entities.context: Enzyme pathway requiring magnesium as cofactor for dopamine metabolism

entities.name: Pre-Sleep Protocol
entities.context: Phase 6 of a multi-phase daily protocol, 30-60 min before bed
